name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] TheHive Case Create
_fix: Fixed all empty bodyParameters. Fixed TheHive Add Observable URL expression (was JS template literal, not n8n expression). Observables now sent as bulk array.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, description: $json.description, severity: $json.severity, tlp: $json.tlp, tags: $json.tags, tasks: $json.tasks.map(t => ({ title: t.title ?? t, status: 'Waiting' })) }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify($json.observables.map(o => ({ dataType: o.type ?? o.dataType ?? 'other', data: o.value ?? o.data, message: o.message ?? '', tlp: o.tlp ?? $json.tlp ?? 2, ioc: o.ioc ?? true, sighted: o.sighted ?? false }))) }}
